_publications._publicationTitle: Development of the PROMIS pediatric stigma and extension to the PROMIS pediatric stigma: skin item banks.

_contextSnippet: The PROMIS Stigma Measure – Skin consists of 18 Pediatric PROMIS Stigma Measure items and six skin-specific items, and these 24 items were co-calibrated onto the same measurement continuum
details: 24 items co-calibrated onto the same measurement continuum with acceptable fit indices: CFI = 0.989, RMSEA = 0.068, R-square ranging 0.55-0.88
